title: TitanSeal Sealants Launch — Logo-System Extension, Swappable SKU Label/Carton Data-Merge, and Print-Ready + Digital Asset Package
one_line_ask: Take the approved TitanSeal master logo plus the client's authored InDesign label .indd and Illustrator carton .ai mechanicals, derive the full logo-variant system, data-merge the three SKUs into swappable print-ready label/carton artwork, and output the print PDFs plus a correctly-sized digital-asset pack.

issues: Very slight warm colour cast on the stucco wall — trivial to correct in post
Caulk gun barrel clips the left frame edge, minor compositional crop issue
Depth of field renders the window glass reflection slightly busier than ideal but acceptable for documentary style
No visible skin pores on wrist — wrist is partially obscured by glove cuff, though glove fabric weave is clearly rendered

assets.name: titanseal_label_mechanical.indd
assets.note: Client-provided .indd template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).

assets.name: titanseal_carton_mechanical.ai
assets.note: Client-provided .ai template; represented here as an authored text proxy (binary Adobe format not synthesizable).
